# Varamyr
agot_init_154500017 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_154500017 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_154500017
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_western_09
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_indian_03
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_western_09
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_indian_03
	}
}

			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Adarys_53 }

		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_m_beard_fp3_iranian_02
	}
	agot_schedule_scripted_hair_dye_update_effect = { DYE = shadowmint_hair_dye AGE = agot_standard_hair_dye_age }
}

# Paro Adarys
agot_init_Adarys_54 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Adarys_54 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Adarys_54
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Adarys_54 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_02
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_m_beard_fp3_iranian_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_02

		}

}

		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Baratheon_56 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Baratheon_56
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Baratheon_56 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_valyrian_braid_01
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_valyrian_braid_01
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
		}
	}
}

			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Blackwood_99 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Blackwood_99
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Blackwood_99 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_female_hair_custom_27
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_female_hair_custom_27
		}

# Hoster Bourney
agot_init_Bourney_6 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Bourney_6 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Bourney_6
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_mena_01
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_m_beard_ep3_byzantine_03
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_mena_01
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_m_beard_ep3_byzantine_03
	}
}

			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Bourney_13 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Bourney_13
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Bourney_13 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_valyrian_braid_01
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_beard_tywins_muttonchops
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_valyrian_braid_01
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_beard_tywins_muttonchops
		}
	}

agot_init_Brax_26 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Brax_26 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Brax_26
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_western_07
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_western_07
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
}

		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp1_04
	}
	agot_schedule_scripted_hair_update_effect = { HAIR = hair_trait_no_hairstyles AGE = 20 }
	agot_schedule_scripted_hair_dye_update_effect = { DYE = selhoru_skies_hair_dye AGE = agot_standard_hair_dye_age }
}

# Hugh Conklyn
agot_init_Conklyn_8 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Conklyn_8 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Conklyn_8
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_western_08
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_western_08
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
}

# Lyonel Corbray
agot_init_Corbray_2 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Corbray_2 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Corbray_2
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Corbray_2 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_02
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_sub_saharan_03
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_02
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_sub_saharan_03
		}
	}
}

# Dermett Corbray
agot_init_Corbray_44 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Corbray_44 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Corbray_44
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Corbray_44 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_10_2
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_mena_04
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_10_2
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_mena_04
		}
	}
}

	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Darklyn_47 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Darklyn_47
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Darklyn_47 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_m_hair_fp3_iranian_03
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_m_beard_ep2_western_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_m_hair_fp3_iranian_03
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_m_beard_ep2_western_01
		}
	}
}

		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Forrester_4 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Forrester_4
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Forrester_4 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_western_baby_01
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_western_baby_01
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_01
		}
	}
}

# Torrhen Karstark
agot_init_Karstark_18 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Karstark_18 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Karstark_18
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Karstark_18 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_northern_02
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_northern_02
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
		}
	}
}

		add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_indian_01
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
}

	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_LannisterLP_7 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_03
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_03
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
		}
	}
}

		add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_indian_02

# Maric Longwaters
agot_init_Longwaters_5 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Longwaters_5 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Longwaters_5
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Longwaters_5 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_m_hair_fp3_iranian_01
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_m_hair_fp3_iranian_01
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
		}
	}
}

		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_western_02
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_m_beard_mpo_mongol_03
		}
	}
}

		add_character_flag = is_Marsten_96
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Marsten_96 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_21
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_steppe_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_21
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_steppe_01
		}
		agot_schedule_scripted_hair_update_effect = { HAIR = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_10_2 AGE = 18 }
		agot_schedule_scripted_beard_update_effect = { BEARD = beard_trait_male_beard_steppe_01 AGE = 18 }
	}
}

agot_init_Massey_27 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Massey_27 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Massey_27
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_christian_03
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_03
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_christian_03
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_03
	}
}

		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_10_2

		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Meadows_21 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Meadows_21
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Meadows_21 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_western_06
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_western_06
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_01
		}
	}
}

agot_init_Mormont_2 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Mormont_2 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Mormont_2
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Mormont_2 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_02
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_western_09
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_02
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_western_09
		}
		agot_schedule_scripted_hair_update_effect = { HAIR = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_02 AGE = 47 }
		agot_schedule_scripted_beard_update_effect = { BEARD = beard_trait_male_beard_fp1_05 AGE = 47 }
	}
}

		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Mudd_53 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Mudd_53
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_fp1_07
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_fp1_07
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
	}
}

		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Paenaar_56 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Paenaar_56
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_byzantine_01
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_03
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_byzantine_01
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_03
	}
}

agot_init_Peake_60 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Peake_60 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Peake_60
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Peake_60 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_m_hair_ep3_byzantine_01
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_02
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_m_hair_ep3_byzantine_01
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_christian_02
		}
	}
}

agot_init_Slate_1 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Slate_1 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Slate_1
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_fp1_02
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_fp1_02
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
}

			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Stark_1 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Stark_1
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Stark_1 }

			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_03
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_fp2_iberian_muslim_03
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
		}
		agot_schedule_scripted_hair_update_effect = { HAIR = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_08 AGE = 24 }
		agot_schedule_scripted_beard_update_effect = { BEARD = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01 AGE = 24 }
	}
}

		agot_schedule_scripted_hair_update_effect = { HAIR = hair_trait_male_hair_fp1_05 AGE = 60 }

		agot_schedule_scripted_beard_update_effect = { BEARD = beard_trait_male_agot_old_king_beard_01 AGE = 60 }

# Aurane Velaryon
agot_init_Velaryon_5 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Velaryon_5 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Velaryon_5
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Velaryon_5 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_07
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_m_beard_ep3_byzantine_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_07
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_m_beard_ep3_byzantine_01
		}
	}
}

# Jacaerys Velaryon

		}
		add_character_flag = is_Velaryon_6

	if = {

		add_character_flag = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_17
		add_character_flag = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_male_hair_custom_17
		make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_no_beard
	}
}

		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Whitewood_34 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Whitewood_34
	}
	if = {
		limit = { is_alive = yes }
		add_character_flag = hair_trait_f_hair_tgp_japanese_04
	}
	else = {
		make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_f_hair_tgp_japanese_04
	}
}

	agot_schedule_scripted_hair_dye_update_effect = { DYE = ambitious_amber_hair_dye AGE = agot_standard_hair_dye_age }
}

# Denano Zokan
agot_init_Zokan_4 = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_alive = yes
			NOT = { has_character_flag = is_Zokan_4 }
		}
		add_character_flag = is_Zokan_4
	}
	if = {
		limit = { sex_same_as = character:Dummy_Zokan_4 }
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = yes }
			add_character_flag = hair_trait_m_hair_ep3_byzantine_02
			add_character_flag = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
		}
		else = {
			make_trait_inactive = hair_trait_m_hair_ep3_byzantine_02
			make_trait_inactive = beard_trait_male_beard_fp2_iberian_muslim_01
		}
	}
}
